title: Case File
description: Everything you need as a detective
story:
Victor Hale is dead.

A powerful tech entrepreneur, found lifeless in his own penthouse late at night.

No forced entry. No signs of struggle. Just a quiet, calculated murder.

You arrive at the scene. Something feels off.

Security logs confirm it—only three people had access to the penthouse that night.

And now, they sit before you.
howToPlaySlide1: The scene is quiet, but something feels wrong.
A body lies before you. No witnesses. No clear answers.
howToPlaySlide2: Only fragments — details waiting to be noticed.
howToPlaySlide3: Each has a story. Each hides something.
howToPlaySlide4: When you are ready, make your accusation.
Choose carefully — you only get one chance.
